descriptions.value: In fact, Jimmy's my big brother. He's very good at playing video games and sometimes, he even lets me play too! I know he loves me very much and protects me from... aliens? Yeah! Aliens!

descriptions.name: Jimmy has a mustache!
descriptions.type: Max, an Autistic Journey Trading Card

descriptions.value: Adam is my best friend. In fact, he's always there for me and has a lot of knowledge about things like science-fiction and video games!

descriptions.name: And so, Adam is my best friend!
descriptions.type: Max, an Autistic Journey Trading Card
descriptions.market_name: And so, Adam is my best friend!
descriptions.market_hash_name: 511630-And so, Adam is my best friend!

descriptions.value: Ellie is my step-sister and, in fact, she's an artist! She is always singing and sometimes dancing too. It's funny and sometimes, I have to leave because I don't like singing...

descriptions.name: Long live Queen Ellie!
descriptions.type: Max, an Autistic Journey Trading Card

descriptions.value: Charles is my little step-brother. In fact, he's very annoying but also nice, sometimes... I just wish he'd stop teasing me sometimes... Oh! And he runs everywhere all the time!

descriptions.name: STOP IT CHARLES!!
descriptions.type: Max, an Autistic Journey Trading Card

And only the wind blows , the sun will fall asleep..
Near the garden there is a basement
Еat butter and snowman in the backyard
Books, fireplace, candles , What could be better ?
I pray we're not all there is. If so, we're in big trouble.
We all know interspecies romance is weird.

Man has gone out to explore other worlds and other civilizations without having explored his own labyrinth of dark passages and secret chambers, and without finding what lies behind doorways that he himself has sealed.
What in the blue star-blazes did you see in Jason?

There are places on planet earth,
where common sense doesn't apply.
Never memorize something that you can look up.
If we knew what it was we were doing, it would not be called research, would it?
Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known.
Everything must be made as simple as possible. But not simpler.
The good thing about science is that it's true whether or not you believe in it.

Dr. Zachary Deevon has created these especially for his mission to steal the Portable Nuclear Power Plant from Mortech. These allow him to throw and retrieve his favorite wrench with ease and on queue.
Turrets developed and sold by the private military company Mortech. These have a smart predictive AI program that will shoot at where you are going to be.
A prototype of the time traveling machine Dr. Deevon is creating in order to save his family. It runs on rechargeable AA batteries, and is capable of stopping time for a short period.
This is Dr. Deevon's most favorite tool. He uses it for crafting all his creations and inventions, and never leaves home without it. Never know when you have to tighten something up!
Mike was a prototype of the first iteration of the Mortech Turret industry line. Mike is now sleeping. Do not disturb Mike.

Quadron is among the stronger tiers of enemy bots. Its arsenal consists of standard missile and laser attacks, along with his ability to simply push the ball to its doom.

Cyclone is the most powerful among the Swarm, being the only bot powerful enough to destroy the ball with direct fire. Once its cannons are charged, Cyclone will focus all its power on massive lasers.
As the most "pushy" bot amongst the Swarm, Dualzen will align and thrust itself toward the ball  arbitrarily. At rest, Dualzen will launch explosives.
The Swarm has no feelings. Suicide is just a means to an end.
Is it a weapon or a victim? You decide.
